programs.title: Van Halen: A Mammoth Legacy
programs.desc: The career of Van Halen was as tumultuous as it was lucrative; they came to redefine the world of Rock and Roll; through all the trials and tribulations the band endured, their fame and influence in rock is cemented; this is the Mammoth Legacy of Van Halen.

programs.title: True Dating Stories
programs.desc: Allie falls for a handsome pilot who lives in her building. But when he disappears Allie is left heartbroken until he shows up again. Dorian goes on a date with a girl who has a Jekyll and Hyde-like personality.

programs.title: True Dating Stories
programs.desc: In 1995, Tanya was on a double date driving through the mountains; the boys hunt down an elk and leave the girls stranded in the Utah wilderness; 19-year-old Sam dates a much older army veteran with a dark past and an insatiable sexual appetite.

programs.title: Off the Map With Shannen and Holly
programs.desc: The girls go zip lining; a horse sanctuary.

programs.title: Off the Map With Shannen and Holly
programs.desc: A night of music and dancing; Southern cuisine with a local twist.

programs.title: Big Freedia Means Business
programs.desc: The team goes to Los Angeles to advance their business ventures and perform at the star-studded Truth Awards.
